basic_details.job_title: HLL Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for HR Officer, Lab Technician and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: HLL Lifecare Limited (HLL) - HINDLABS Healthcare Services Division (HCS)
basic_details.post_name: Lab Technician, Accounts Officer, District Project Coordinator, HR Officer, IT Officer, Lab Coordinator, Consultant Pathologist, Consultant Histopathologist, Consultant Microbiologist
basic_details.short_information: HLL Lifecare HINDLABS Chhattisgarh Recruitment 2026: Get the latest HLL Lifecare recruitment notification 2026 for Lab Technician, Accounts Officer, District Project Coordinator, HR Officer, IT Officer, Lab Coordinator and Consultant posts under HINDLABS Healthcare Services Division (HCS), HLL Lifecare Limited, for Medical Laboratory Project in Chhattisgarh. The Walk-in Interview process starts on 3rd May 2026 across multiple locations in Chhattisgarh. Find HLL Lifecare HINDLABS vacancies across Chhattisgarh on the official website lifecarehll.com. You can also get Free Job Alert of “Upcoming

application_fee.details: No application fee details are mentioned in the notification. This is a Walk-in Interview based recruitment - candidates must appear directly at the respective venue on the scheduled date with all required original documents.

age_limit.sc / st / obc / pwd: Age relaxation as per Government of India rules
age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for all FTC positions is 37 years as on 01-05-2026. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwD category candidates as per Government of India rules.

post_wise_qualification.Essential Qualification & Experience: DMLT / BSc (MLT) / PG(DMLT) / MSc (MLT). Experience: DMLT with 5 years experience as Lab Technician in a medium size lab; OR BSc (MLT) with 3 years experience; OR PG(DMLT) with 2 years experience; OR MSc (MLT) with 1 year experience.
MCom / CA Inter / ICWA Inter. Minimum 2 years post qualification experience in finance & accounts functions of a commercial organization.

MBA in Healthcare Management / MSc Medical Microbiology / Medical Biochemistry / Biotechnology / Microbiology / MLT / Biochemistry / Health Science. Post Graduation with 1 year experience; OR BSc with PGDMLT with 3 years experience. Overall management of Lab/Diagnostic Centre.
Graduation in any discipline / MBA HR / MSW or equivalent preferred. Minimum 3 years experience (Graduation in any discipline).
BSc / MSc (Computer Science / IT) / BCA / BTech / BE (CS/IT) / MCA. Minimum 2 years experience in computer hardware maintenance, networking, server maintenance etc.

Any Graduate / Post Graduate Degree / DMLT / BMLT. MSc with 3 years relevant experience; OR BSc Graduate with 5 years relevant experience; OR DMLT/BMLT with 5 years experience. Overall management of Lab/Diagnostic Centre.
MD (Pathology). Send CV to [email protected] on or before 30-05-2026.
MD (Histopathology). Send CV to [email protected] on or before 30-05-2026.
MD (Microbiology). Send CV to [email protected] on or before 30-05-2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all qualification and experience criteria as mentioned below. Only candidates meeting the required qualification and experience will be allowed to attend the skill test and written test. Candidates must bring all original certificates along with self-attested copies at the time of Walk-in Interview. | Post-wise Qualification, Experience and Pay Range

selection_process: Stage 2 Written Test - MCQ Based, 50 Marks, 30 Minutes, No Negative Marking (only for candidates qualifying Skill Test)

The selection process for FTC positions comprises a Skill Test followed by a Written Test. Only candidates who qualify in the Skill Test will be allowed to attend the Written Test. The Written Test consists of multiple-choice questions (MCQ) to be answered within 30 minutes with a maximum score of 50. There is no negative marking for wrong answers in the Written Test.
how_to_apply: Candidates for FTC positions must Walk-in for the interview at the respective location on the scheduled date between 09:00 AM and 01:00 PM. No prior registration is required for Walk-in. Candidates must carry all original certificates along with one set of self-attested copies at the time of interview. Failure to produce original documents will disqualify the candidate from appearing for the selection test.
Interested Consultant Pathologist (MD), Consultant Histopathologist (MD), and Consultant Microbiologist (MD) candidates must forward their updated CVs to [email protected] on or before 30-05-2026.
Documents to Carry at the Time of Walk-in Interview:
Educational Qualification Certificates and Mark Sheets
SC / ST / OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) Community Certificate from concerned Revenue Authority (if applicable)
Apply / Walk-in at: Respective venue as per schedule above. For Consultant posts, email CV to: [email protected]
important_instructions: The appointment will be on Fixed Tenure Contract (FTC) basis only. Candidates must meet the required qualification and experience criteria to be eligible for the skill test and written test. Only candidates qualifying in the Skill Test will be allowed to attend the Written Test. The proposed place of posting may vary as per business requirements - management reserves the right to determine the final posting location. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates will be as per Government of India rules. Canvassing in any form will be a disqualification. Candidates must bring all original certificates along with self-attested copies - failure to produce originals will disqualify the candidate. SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates must produce their original Community Certificate from concerned Revenue Authorities. Reporting time at all venues is 09:00 AM to 01:00 PM on the respective interview date. For further clarification, contact: 9203651344 or email [email protected]. All decisions of HLL Lifecare management regarding eligibility, selection, and posting are final and binding.

faq.question: Q1. What is HLL Lifecare HINDLABS Chhattisgarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: HLL Lifecare HINDLABS Chhattisgarh Recruitment 2026 is a walk‑in recruitment drive by HLL Lifecare Limited (HINDLABS – Healthcare Services Division) to hire Lab Technicians, Accounts Officer, District Project Coordinator, HR Officer, IT Officer, Lab Coordinator and Consultants for its Medical Laboratory Project in Chhattisgarh on Fixed‑Term Contract/consultant basis. HLL is a Mini Ratna PSU under the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare and operates diagnostic laboratories and imaging services in multiple states.

faq.question: Q2. Which posts are available under HLL HINDLABS Chhattisgarh 2026 recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification covers multiple posts including Lab Technician, Accounts Officer, District Project Coordinator, HR Officer, IT Officer (Divisional), Lab Coordinator and consultant roles such as Consultant Pathologist, Consultant Histopathologist and Consultant Microbiologist. FTC positions are for field and lab operations across State Reference Labs, Divisional Labs, District Labs, Civil Hospital Labs and selected CHCs, while consultant posts are largely specialist doctor roles.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates and walk‑in schedule for HLL HINDLABS in Chhattisgarh?
faq.answer: Walk‑in interviews for FTC posts will be conducted between 3 May 2026 and 12 May 2026 at various locations such as Manendragarh, Raipur, Jagdalpur, Jashpur, Durg, Kondagaon, Ambikapur, Bilaspur, Sukma and Balodabazar, with reporting time from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM. The last date to submit CVs for Consultant Pathologist, Histopathologist and Microbiologist posts via email is 30 May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit and is there any age relaxation?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Fixed‑Term Contract positions under this recruitment is 37 years as on 1 May 2026. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates will be provided as per Government of India rules mentioned in the general conditions of HINDLABS/HLL notifications.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications and experience required for Lab Technician and other key posts?
faq.answer: Lab Technician posts generally require DMLT/BSc(MLT)/PG(DMLT)/MSc(MLT) with 1–5 years of relevant laboratory experience depending on qualification level. Accounts Officer, District Project Coordinator, HR Officer, IT Officer and Lab Coordinator roles require post‑graduate or graduate degrees such as MCom/CA Inter/ICWA Inter, MBA in Healthcare, MSc in relevant health sciences, HR/Management or IT degrees plus 2–5 years of experience as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for HLL HINDLABS FTC posts in Chhattisgarh?
faq.answer: For FTC posts, the selection process consists of a Skill Test followed by a Written Test conducted on the same day of the walk‑in. Only candidates who qualify in the Skill Test will be allowed to appear for the Written Test, which is an objective MCQ‑based paper of 50 marks with a 30‑minute duration and no negative marking.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this HLL HINDLABS recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned for the walk‑in‑based HLL HINDLABS Chhattisgarh recruitment. Candidates can directly attend the walk‑in interviews at the specified venues with their documents without any prior online fee payment.

faq.question: Q8. How can candidates apply for HLL HINDLABS Chhattisgarh FTC and Consultant posts?
faq.answer: For FTC posts, eligible candidates must attend the walk‑in interview at the designated venue and date, carrying original certificates and self‑attested copies for verification. For Consultant Pathologist/Histopathologist/Microbiologist posts, candidates need to email their updated CVs to the official HCS recruitment email ID [email protected] on or before the specified last date.
